http.comment: Check ability to get all news from database through http

oracle.query: INSERT INTO NEWS (NEWSNAME, NEWSNUMBER, ACTIVE, CREATEDAT) VALUES ('Norway', 5421241, 1, TO_TIMESTAMP('2021-01-20 07:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'))
INSERT INTO NEWS (NEWSNAME, NEWSNUMBER, ACTIVE, CREATEDAT) VALUES ('Sweden', 10379295, 1, TO_TIMESTAMP('2021-01-21 08:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'))
INSERT INTO NEWS (NEWSNAME, NEWSNUMBER, ACTIVE, CREATEDAT) VALUES ('Finland', 5527578, 1, TO_TIMESTAMP('2021-01-22 09:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'))
INSERT INTO NEWS (NEWSNAME, NEWSNUMBER, ACTIVE, CREATEDAT) VALUES ('Denmark', 5795780, 0, TO_TIMESTAMP('2021-01-23 10:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'))
INSERT INTO NEWS (NEWSNAME, NEWSNUMBER, ACTIVE, CREATEDAT) VALUES ('Iceland', 341243, 1, TO_TIMESTAMP('2021-01-24 11:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'))

http.comment: Check ability to add news to database through http

oracle.query: SELECT * FROM NEWS ORDER BY ID
UPDATE NEWS SET NEWSNUMBER = 99999999 WHERE NEWSNAME = 'Mexico'
UPDATE NEWS SET active = 0 WHERE NEWSNUMBER > 100000000
DELETE FROM NEWS WHERE id = 16

http.comment: Check ability to get news from database through http by 'id' that was delete

oracle.query: SELECT * FROM news ORDER BY id
ALTER TABLE NEWS ADD CAPITAL VARCHAR2(255)

oracle.comment: Execute INSERT and SELECT 'oracle' commands for new column
oracle.query: INSERT INTO NEWS (NEWSNAME, NEWSNUMBER, ACTIVE, CREATEDAT, CAPITAL) VALUES ('Malta', 514000, 1, TO_TIMESTAMP('2021-01-24 14:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 'Valletta')
SELECT CAPITAL FROM NEWS WHERE NEWSNAME LIKE '%Ma%'

http.comment: Check ability to get news from database through http by 'name'

oracle.comment: Execute ALTER TABLE DROP COLUMN 'oracle' command
oracle.query: ALTER TABLE NEWS DROP COLUMN CAPITAL
CREATE TABLE TESTLUM.CITIES ( ID NUMBER(10), NAME VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL, COUNTRY_ID NUMBER(10), POPULATION NUMBER(10), CREATEDAT DATE DEFAULT SYSDATE, PRIMARY KEY (ID))

oracle.comment: Execute INSERT 'oracle' command for a new table
oracle.query: INSERT INTO CITIES (ID, NAME, COUNTRY_ID, POPULATION, CREATEDAT) VALUES (1, 'New York City', 1, 8537673, TO_TIMESTAMP('2022-04-22 10:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'))
INSERT INTO CITIES (ID, NAME, COUNTRY_ID, POPULATION, CREATEDAT) VALUES (2, 'Los Angeles', 1, 3977683, TO_TIMESTAMP('2022-04-22 10:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'))
INSERT INTO CITIES (ID, NAME, COUNTRY_ID, POPULATION, CREATEDAT) VALUES (3, 'Chicago', 1, 2693976, TO_TIMESTAMP('2022-04-22 10:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'))
INSERT INTO CITIES (ID, NAME, COUNTRY_ID, POPULATION, CREATEDAT) VALUES (4, 'Paris', 2, 2140526, TO_TIMESTAMP('2022-04-22 10:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'))
SELECT NEWS.NEWSNAME, NEWS.NEWSNUMBER, CITIES.NAME, CITIES.POPULATION FROM NEWS INNER JOIN CITIES ON NEWS.ID = CITIES.COUNTRY_ID ORDER BY NEWS.ID
DROP TABLE TESTLUM.CITIES
DROP SEQUENCE news_id_seq
CREATE SEQUENCE news_id_seq START WITH 1
